title: Rahil Jafry
compiled_truth: Rahil Jafry is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-06-29 to 2002-05-13), Rahil Jafry sent 112 and received 682 emails, totalling 794 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (62), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (23), [Kal Shah](people/kal-shah) (19), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (17), [Marcus Nettelton](people/marcus-nettelton) (17).
